title: hieracium sartonsicum
intro: Hieracium sartonsicum, also known as Sarton's hawkweed, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects due to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones. The health benefits of Hieracium sartonsicum are said to include reducing inflammation and improving digestive health, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a tea or tincture, although its use is not commonly practiced due to the availability of more well-studied herbal alternatives.
